message:
fix(membrane): sanitize non-finite floats in CliffordController observations

Add sanitize_unit_interval() helper that clamps finite values to
[0.0, 1.0] and maps NaN/Inf to 0.0. Apply it to overlap_fraction
and length_regime fields of AlignmentObservation before they enter
multivector computation.

Prevents non-finite values from silently corrupting the controller's
internal Clifford algebra state, which would propagate NaN through
all subsequent alignment decisions.

Two new tests: non_finite_and_out_of_range_scalars_are_sanitized and
adversarial_scalar_stream_keeps_summary_finite_and_bounded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
